programme.title: Portland Charter Boat Wars
programme.desc: Facing worsening weather conditions, one charter boat faces a hard decision about whether to head home as their clients become increasingly seasick.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics we look back at three of the best wins scored by Hall of Famer and seven-time Supercars Champion, Jamie Whincup.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics we look back at the 2007 Sandown 500.

programme.title: Frozen Gold
programme.desc: Ray must build a crucial piece of mining equipment. Erik and Christian head to a neighbouring claim where the promise of bigger gold is hard to resist.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for his grades. Kenny faces obstacles furnishing his new house, while Lisa learns some important lessons.

programme.title: Step Outside with Paul Burt
programme.desc: We're joining the ABF Immortals on their exciting tour of Kowanyama, exploring the croc infested country with the Rugby legends and Leroy's arming the boys with some handy tips to landing Barramundi.

programme.title: The Fishing Show
programme.desc: Bill travels to Gippsland to catch his largest bream ever. Then James goes to the high country to showcase a unique fly fishing program, designed to aid people diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Al McGlashan's Fish'n With Mates
programme.desc: Al McGlashan's ticking off items from his personal fishing bucket list, including the chance to swim with a swirling vortex of spawning snapper despite the danger of lurking sharks.

programme.title: Red's Fishing Adventures
programme.desc: Follow Red on a wild journey across Australia and beyond. The fishing is world-class, but it's the people, places, and moments that make it unforgettable.

programme.title: Charter Boat Wars 2: Port Phillip Bay
programme.desc: Skippers navigate challenging conditions and go head-to-head in competition on the open water, testing skill and resilience.

programme.title: AFL Pre-Game
programme.desc: A look ahead at this afternoon's AFL game.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Demons challenge the Lions, live and free from the MCG. Bounce time: 3:15 pm AEST.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: An African traveller with a one-way bus ticket to America is questioned at the border. Officers wait as an internal carrier passes cocaine pellets through his system.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: In Detroit, an Asian woman arrives with an American man who is not her husband. CBP discover a large collection of vapes and vape oils in a traveller's luggage.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Three men arrive with clues in their bags for Customs officers. A search ends with a dramatic walkout, and officers think a laptop hides evidence of a massive scam. Narrated by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A passenger admits to using narcotics, but officers make a find that he will struggle to explain. A New Zealand man was living a life of crime, but the right girl is living on the wrong side of the border. And the discovery of a mysterious substance puts officers on high alert. Narrated by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: An Australian woman returning from Vietnam attempts to pull a swiftie on Customs and Border Protection officers. Also, a Canadian man says he's arrived for a holiday but records show a previous one-year working holiday turned into a 10-year stay, and at Quarantine, a passenger returning from Iran shocks officials when they inspect her luggage.

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City police officer John McClane tries to save his estranged wife and several others that were taken hostage by terrorists during a Christmas party.

programme.title: The Black Phone
programme.desc: After being abducted and locked in a basement, a boy starts receiving calls on a disconnected phone from the killer's previous victims.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 make their way to Dollywood, stop in to do a lap of Bristol Speedway, and check out Thunder Valley. Just another typical day in the South with guns, barbecue and moonshine.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: In Detroit, an Asian woman arrives with an American man who is not her husband. CBP discover a large collection of vapes and vape oils in a traveller's luggage.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Three men arrive with clues in their bags for Customs officers. A search ends with a dramatic walkout, and officers think a laptop hides evidence of a massive scam. Narrated by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A passenger admits to using narcotics, but officers make a find that he will struggle to explain. A New Zealand man was living a life of crime, but the right girl is living on the wrong side of the border. And the discovery of a mysterious substance puts officers on high alert. Narrated by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: An Australian woman returning from Vietnam attempts to pull a swiftie on Customs and Border Protection officers. Also, a Canadian man says he's arrived for a holiday but records show a previous one-year working holiday turned into a 10-year stay, and at Quarantine, a passenger returning from Iran shocks officials when they inspect her luggage.

programme.title: LIV Golf League
programme.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf tour heads to Club de Golf Chapultepec in Mexico City, Mexico. Catch all the action right here, live and free on 7 & 7plus.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics we revisit racetracks that no longer exist - the old Surfers Paradise in Queensland and Amaroo Park in Sydney.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics we look back at one of the most famous Bathurst 1000s of them all - 1992.

programme.title: LIV to Win
programme.desc: Rahm and Legion XIII outlast Bryson DeChambeau's Crushers in a thrilling playoff for league supremacy. The episode follows a high-stakes showdown between two of LIV Golf's biggest stars: Jon Rahm, driven and emotionally invested after last year's absence in the Team Championship, and Bryson DeChambeau, confident and calculating in his pursuit of a second team title. Inside Legion XIII, tension runs high with fiery passion, while Crushers GC brings a more clinical, strategic approach.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: In Detroit, an Asian woman arrives with an American man who is not her husband. CBP discover a large collection of vapes and vape oils in a traveller's luggage.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Three men arrive with clues in their bags for Customs officers. A search ends with a dramatic walkout, and officers think a laptop hides evidence of a massive scam. Narrated by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Rides Down Under: Aussie Truckers
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes to get a real-life insight into the trials and tribulations of one of Australia's premier independent trucking companies.

programme.title: Circuit Boats Drivers Championship
programme.desc: The final event of the 2025 Land Transport Junior NDC would crown the first ever Champions after a second round at the Mildura Ski Club.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick puts the pedal to the metal when NASCAR driver Greg Biffle asks him to restore his 1970s Montesa motorcycle. Later, the shop drives forward on a 1950s Kidillac.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina, California, for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides. Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In South Florida, the guys gain access to Bill's massive stockpile. Then, Mike falls for a century-old Royal Pioneer motorbike but baulks at the mammoth price tag.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars compete for gold-medal deals. A guy races in with a genuine Olympic torch carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games. Rick eyes a diploma from the 1912 Olympics.

programme.title: The Agenda Setters: Rugby League
programme.desc: Corey Parker leads The Agenda Setters: Rugby League with an all-star panel, delivering sharp analysis and breaking news.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A massive nugget changes everything for one gold hunter, while the Gold Gypsies face the worst storm in decades, pushing their season to the brink.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Businessman come Rookie Miner Dennis gambles half a million dollars on the purchase of a 62-acre gold mine in remote Queensland. Leigh invites two British backpackers onto the 1870 Clermont lease for a metal detector lesson without consulting Donnie, who's under pressure to find gold to repay their investor. Gold Sniper Levi breaks the Australian record for the biggest gold nugget ever sniped.

programme.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A Top End trawler demolition bites back for Team Salvage as a five-metre croc patrols the area on a free-for-all mechanical nightmare; Shaun and Sarah dig deep as a wreck on the beach pushes them to breaking point.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Climb aboard for an exclusive look at some of the coolest working vessels in the world.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina, California, for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides. Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In South Florida, the guys gain access to Bill's massive stockpile. Then, Mike falls for a century-old Royal Pioneer motorbike but baulks at the mammoth price tag.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars compete for gold-medal deals. A guy races in with a genuine Olympic torch carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games. Rick eyes a diploma from the 1912 Olympics.

programme.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A Top End trawler demolition bites back for Team Salvage as a five-metre croc patrols the area on a free-for-all mechanical nightmare; Shaun and Sarah dig deep as a wreck on the beach pushes them to breaking point.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A massive nugget changes everything for one gold hunter, while the Gold Gypsies face the worst storm in decades, pushing their season to the brink.
